title: Per-component token bindings tokens.yml (author-facing)
description: Schema for components/src/<slug>/tokens.yml — the component-specific token bindings. Each binding is a REFERENCE into the global token file (tokens/tokens.json) plus a human-readable usage-context label. Never embeds token values; never duplicates definitions.

bindings.description: The tokens this component binds, with usage context.

token.description: Token name. MUST resolve to a known token in tokens/tokens.json.

context.description: What the component uses this token for.
